exploration_notes: The bug is a missing ResourceSlice event handler in the Kubernetes scheduler's DRA plugin. When a pod requests DRA devices and the driver hasn't started yet, the pod fails scheduling because newResourceModel() finds no ResourceSlices. The pod enters the unschedulable pool tagged with 'DynamicResources' as the rejecting plugin. When the driver later creates ResourceSlice objects, no re-queuing happens because: (1) the ResourceSlice GVK constant is not defined in framework/types.go, (2) EventsToRe
